original_statement: which country had no gold medals?
mutated_statement: which entity had no gold medals but also had the most gold medals?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 条件添加（极值） + 语义矛盾: "country" → "entity"（country→entity） | 新增并列从句 "but also had the most gold medals"（无该从句→新增"but also had the most gold medals"，与"no gold medals"互相矛盾）

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration中可见关键证据：simple_query的thought写明“Canada is the only entity with 0 gold medals. The Soviet Union has the most gold medals with 7.”，judge_thought也把问题理解为“请求两个实体：一个无金牌，一个金牌最多”，并标注[Correct]。Agent没有指出“无金牌”与“又金牌最多”语义上互相排斥，而是将矛盾拆成两个独立子问题并分别回答（返回“canada|soviet union”）。因此Agent未识别或质疑指令内部自相矛盾，属于“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别。
